name: ctl-adapter-sqlite-vec
description: Builds a rebuildable local SQLite vector index from CTL records while leaving the CTL package as the source of truth.
license: adapter Apache-2.0; upstream sqlite-vec MIT/Apache-2.0, verify before release
quality_checks: all indexed rows keep CTL record ids
index can be rebuilt from package files
embedding model and dimensions are recorded
source paths and asset paths remain relative
missing sqlite-vec dependency reports install guidance
